name: chroma_list_collections
description: List all collection names in the Chroma database with pagination support.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of collections to return

offset.description: Optional number of collections to skip before returning results

name: chroma_create_collection
description: Create a new Chroma collection with configurable HNSW parameters.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to create

embedding_function_name.description: Name of the embedding function to use. Options: 'default', 'cohere', 'openai', 'jina', 'voyageai', 'ollama', 'roboflow'

metadata.description: Optional metadata dict to add to the collection

name: chroma_peek_collection
description: Peek at documents in a Chroma collection.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to peek into

limit.description: Number of documents to peek at

name: chroma_get_collection_info
description: Get information about a Chroma collection.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to get info about

name: chroma_get_collection_count
description: Get the number of documents in a Chroma collection.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to count

name: chroma_modify_collection
description: Modify a Chroma collection's name or metadata.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to modify

new_name.description: Optional new name for the collection

new_metadata.description: Optional new metadata for the collection

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to fork

new_collection_name.description: Name of the new collection to create

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to delete

name: chroma_add_documents
description: Add documents to a Chroma collection.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to add documents to

documents.description: List of text documents to add

ids.description: List of IDs for the documents (required)

metadatas.description: Optional list of metadata dictionaries for each document

name: chroma_query_documents
description: Query documents from a Chroma collection with advanced filtering.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to query

query_texts.description: List of query texts to search for

n_results.description: Number of results to return per query

where.description: Optional metadata filters using Chroma's query operators

include.description: List of what to include in response. By default, this will include documents, metadatas, and distances.

name: chroma_get_documents
description: Get documents from a Chroma collection with optional filtering.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to get documents from

ids.description: Optional list of document IDs to retrieve

where.description: Optional metadata filters using Chroma's query operators

include.description: List of what to include in response. By default, this will include documents, and metadatas.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of documents to return

offset.description: Optional number of documents to skip before returning results

name: chroma_update_documents
description: Update documents in a Chroma collection.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to update documents in

ids.description: List of document IDs to update (required)

embeddings.description: Optional list of new embeddings for the documents. Must match length of ids if provided.

metadatas.description: Optional list of new metadata dictionaries for the documents. Must match length of ids if provided.

documents.description: Optional list of new text documents. Must match length of ids if provided.

name: chroma_delete_documents
description: Delete documents from a Chroma collection.

collection_name.description: Name of the collection to delete documents from

ids.description: List of document IDs to delete
